description: UCC Filing — processes Uniform Commercial Code financing statements, amendments, continuations, and terminations for secured transactions

hard_stops.label: Debtor Name Does Not Meet Exact Match Standard
hard_stops.logic: Debtor name on UCC filing does not conform to the state's exact match search logic standard — filing may be ineffective to perfect the security interest

hard_stops.label: Continuation Filed After Lapse
hard_stops.logic: UCC continuation statement filed after the original filing has lapsed (past the 5-year term) — continuation is ineffective, must file new financing statement

hard_stops.label: Filing Fee Not Collected
hard_stops.logic: UCC filing fee has not been collected — Secretary of State / Recorder cannot accept filing without payment

soft_flags.label: Approaching Lapse Date
soft_flags.logic: UCC filing is within 6 months of the 5-year lapse date — secured party should consider filing a continuation statement
